signal_title: Estatuto Digital da Criança e do Adolescente
risk_rationale: The new Brazilian legislation introduces mandatory age verification and enhanced parental supervision tools, which may require immediate product changes to comply with local laws.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Mandatory age verification for all users.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline does not specify a method for age verification, whereas the new regulation requires explicit verification.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Family Pairing availability is globally rolled out.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline provides basic family pairing but may not meet the enhanced requirements specified by the new regulation.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: CSAM detection using PhotoDNA and proprietary classifiers.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Mandatory removal of child abuse content.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline includes detection but may need to ensure compliance with stricter removal timelines and processes.

remediations.title: Implement Age Verification System
remediations.description: Develop and integrate a robust age verification system to comply with Brazilian regulations.

remediations.title: Enhance Parental Supervision Tools
remediations.description: Upgrade existing family pairing features to include more comprehensive parental controls as per new Brazilian law.

remediations.title: Ensure Compliance with Content Removal
remediations.description: Review and update content moderation processes to ensure timely removal of child abuse content.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new Brazilian law could result in significant fines and damage to brand reputation in a key market.
recommended_actions: Initiate a project to develop and implement an age verification system.
Conduct a gap analysis of current parental supervision tools against new requirements.
Review and update content moderation policies to ensure compliance with content removal mandates.
